idea-plugin.name: Wrap
idea-plugin.description:
Wrap is a launcher for AI coding assistants and custom shell commands.

Configure a wrapper.json file in your project root to define categories of commands and prompts. Access them instantly from the status bar or via Tools → Wrap: Show Menu to launch AI tools (Claude, Codex, Gemini, Coder, Hermes, etc.) in integrated terminals, or send predefined prompts to already-running AI sessions.

Features

  • Two-level popup menu: category → action
  • Run shell commands in a dedicated integrated terminal tab
  • Send prompt text directly to an active terminal (for interactive AI CLIs)
  • WSL (Windows Subsystem for Linux) support per-command
  • Configurable wrapper.json path via Settings → Tools → Wrap

Quick Start

Create wrapper.json in your project root:

[
  {
    "useWsl": ["Claude", "Codex"],
    "Command": [{ "Claude": "claude", "Codex": "codex" }],
    "Content":  [{ "Git Push": "Please commit and push all changes to origin/main" }]
  }
]

Then click Wrap in the status bar to get started.
idea-plugin.change-notes: • 0.0.1 — Initial release, ported from the VSCode extension.
